mapper.sql: id, ShikomiId, ShikomiNo, modelNo, inspectType, QtyWarning, createTime, createUser, WarnQtyOptCode, DemandQtyOptCode, AnswerText, CancelQtyOptCode, OpenToWorld, DelayToCancel, ApplyNo, ApplyType, ApplyQty, Reason, ApplyDate, ApplicantNo, RemainQty, CancelQty, CustomerQty, RetentionDurationDate, ExpirationHandle, RepairQty, inspectStatus
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.shikomi_inspection
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.shikomi_inspection (id, ShikomiId, ShikomiNo, modelNo, inspectType, QtyWarning, createTime, createUser, WarnQtyOptCode, DemandQtyOptCode, AnswerText, CancelQtyOptCode, OpenToWorld, DelayToCancel, ApplyNo, ApplyType, ApplyQty, Reason, ApplyDate, ApplicantNo, RemainQty, CancelQty, CustomerQty, RetentionDurationDate, ExpirationHandle, RepairQty, inspectStatus ) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{shikomiid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{shikomino,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inspecttype,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{qtywarning,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{warnqtyoptcode,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{demandqtyoptcode,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{answertext,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{cancelqtyoptcode,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{opentoworld,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{delaytocancel,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{applyno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applytype,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{applyqty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{reason,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{applydate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{applicantno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remainqty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{cancelqty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{customerqty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{retentiondurationdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{expirationhandle,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{repairqty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{inspectstatus,jdbcType=SMALLINT} )

mapper.update:
update dbo.shikomi_inspection
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
ShikomiId = #{record.shikomiid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
ShikomiNo = #{record.shikomino,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
modelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inspectType = #{record.inspecttype,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
QtyWarning = #{record.qtywarning,jdbcType=INTEGER},
createTime = #{record.createtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
createUser = #{record.createuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
WarnQtyOptCode = #{record.warnqtyoptcode,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
DemandQtyOptCode = #{record.demandqtyoptcode,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
AnswerText = #{record.answertext,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
CancelQtyOptCode = #{record.cancelqtyoptcode,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
OpenToWorld = #{record.opentoworld,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
DelayToCancel = #{record.delaytocancel,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
ApplyNo = #{record.applyno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ApplyType = #{record.applytype,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
ApplyQty = #{record.applyqty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
Reason = #{record.reason,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
ApplyDate = #{record.applydate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ApplicantNo = #{record.applicantno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RemainQty = #{record.remainqty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
CancelQty = #{record.cancelqty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
CustomerQty = #{record.customerqty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
RetentionDurationDate = #{record.retentiondurationdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ExpirationHandle = #{record.expirationhandle,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RepairQty = #{record.repairqty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
inspectStatus = #{record.inspectstatus,jdbcType=SMALLINT},

update dbo.shikomi_inspection set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, ShikomiId = #{record.shikomiid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, ShikomiNo = #{record.shikomino,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, modelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, inspectType = #{record.inspecttype,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, QtyWarning = #{record.qtywarning,jdbcType=INTEGER}, createTime = #{record.createtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, createUser = #{record.createuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, WarnQtyOptCode = #{record.warnqtyoptcode,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, DemandQtyOptCode = #{record.demandqtyoptcode,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, AnswerText = #{record.answertext,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, CancelQtyOptCode = #{record.cancelqtyoptcode,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, OpenToWorld = #{record.opentoworld,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, DelayToCancel = #{record.delaytocancel,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, ApplyNo = #{record.applyno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ApplyType = #{record.applytype,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, ApplyQty = #{record.applyqty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, Reason = #{record.reason,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, ApplyDate = #{record.applydate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, ApplicantNo = #{record.applicantno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RemainQty = #{record.remainqty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, CancelQty = #{record.cancelqty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, CustomerQty = #{record.customerqty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, RetentionDurationDate = #{record.retentiondurationdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, ExpirationHandle = #{record.expirationhandle,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RepairQty = #{record.repairqty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, inspectStatus = #{record.inspectstatus,jdbcType=SMALLINT}

update dbo.shikomi_inspection
ShikomiId = #{shikomiid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
ShikomiNo = #{shikomino,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
modelNo = #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inspectType = #{inspecttype,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
QtyWarning = #{qtywarning,jdbcType=INTEGER},
createTime = #{createtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
createUser = #{createuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
WarnQtyOptCode = #{warnqtyoptcode,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
DemandQtyOptCode = #{demandqtyoptcode,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
AnswerText = #{answertext,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
CancelQtyOptCode = #{cancelqtyoptcode,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
OpenToWorld = #{opentoworld,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
DelayToCancel = #{delaytocancel,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
ApplyNo = #{applyno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ApplyType = #{applytype,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
ApplyQty = #{applyqty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
Reason = #{reason,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
ApplyDate = #{applydate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ApplicantNo = #{applicantno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RemainQty = #{remainqty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
CancelQty = #{cancelqty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
CustomerQty = #{customerqty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
RetentionDurationDate = #{retentiondurationdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ExpirationHandle = #{expirationhandle,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RepairQty = #{repairqty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
inspectStatus = #{inspectstatus,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update dbo.shikomi_inspection set ShikomiId = #{shikomiid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, ShikomiNo = #{shikomino,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, modelNo = #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, inspectType = #{inspecttype,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, QtyWarning = #{qtywarning,jdbcType=INTEGER}, createTime = #{createtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, createUser = #{createuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, WarnQtyOptCode = #{warnqtyoptcode,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, DemandQtyOptCode = #{demandqtyoptcode,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, AnswerText = #{answertext,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, CancelQtyOptCode = #{cancelqtyoptcode,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, OpenToWorld = #{opentoworld,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, DelayToCancel = #{delaytocancel,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, ApplyNo = #{applyno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ApplyType = #{applytype,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, ApplyQty = #{applyqty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, Reason = #{reason,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, ApplyDate = #{applydate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, ApplicantNo = #{applicantno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RemainQty = #{remainqty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, CancelQty = #{cancelqty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, CustomerQty = #{customerqty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, RetentionDurationDate = #{retentiondurationdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, ExpirationHandle = #{expirationhandle,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RepairQty = #{repairqty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, inspectStatus = #{inspectstatus,jdbcType=SMALLINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
